name: Checker
description: A classic checkerboard whose light squares host discs that swell and shrink — the dark squares hold the grid steady while the pieces breathe.

code.style: --disc: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( --ds: @r(18, ${discSize}); transition: ease 500ms; @match((x + y) % 2 == 0) { background: var(--color1); } @match((x + y) % 2 == 1) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--ds) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--ds) * 0.5%); top: calc(50% - @var(--ds) * 0.5%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--disc); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
